name: GANTT

meta.form: task bars on a period grid with done-overlay, milestones, today line
meta.data_required: tasks with start/end in axis units + optional done_to and milestones + a today position

use_when: schedule communication: 4-10 tasks against a period grid
showing done vs remaining per task plus the critical milestone
not_when: full CPM networks with dependencies (planning software, not a slide)
more than ~10 rows (summarize to work packages)

data_shape.title: action title naming the driving task or date
data_shape.axis: {labels: [period names]}; task units are fractional axis positions
data_shape.tasks: array of {label, start?, end?, done_to?, milestone_at?}
data_shape.today: axis position of the status date

scale.note: x maps axis units 0..n linearly; period gridlines at every boundary

rules: bars muted, done-portion overlaid in primary
milestones are diamonds in ink; the today line is negative, dashed, labeled
tasks in schedule order, never re-sorted
anti_patterns: percent labels on every bar (the overlay shows it)
qa: start < end and done_to within [start, end] on every task
title names the driver with a date
